name: Azure Service Bus Monitor
description: Poll an Azure Service Bus queue or topic subscription for new messages and trigger jobs when messages are received

triggers.description: Triggers when new messages are received from the Service Bus queue or topic subscription

outputs.description: Passes message information (message_id, body, subject, content_type, enqueued_time) to triggered jobs via run_config

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when messages are received

fully_qualified_namespace.label: Fully Qualified Namespace
fully_qualified_namespace.description: Service Bus namespace hostname. Required when not using a connection string.

connection_string_env_var.label: Connection String Env Var
connection_string_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the Service Bus connection string. If not provided, DefaultAzureCredential is used.

queue_name.label: Queue Name
queue_name.description: Name of the Service Bus queue to monitor. Provide this OR topic_name.

topic_name.label: Topic Name
topic_name.description: Name of the Service Bus topic to monitor. Requires subscription_name.

subscription_name.label: Subscription Name
subscription_name.description: Name of the topic subscription (required when using topic_name)

max_messages_per_poll.label: Max Messages Per Poll
max_messages_per_poll.description: Maximum number of messages to receive per evaluation

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
